caption: A man with glasses, wearing a dark suit, a light-colored shirt, and a purple tie, appears in a news broadcast setting. He is positioned in front of a blue background featuring a circular graphic with a stylized map and the text "PLUS POLITICS." To his left is a red vertical banner containing the "plustv" logo. A white news ticker at the bottom of the screen displays the text "PLUS POLITICS" and "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU." In the first two frames, a second line of text reads "WATCH ONLINE" and "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV." In the final two frames, this bottom line changes to "SUBSCRIBE" and "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA." Across all frames, the man remains in the same position and attire, looking directly at the camera with a neutral expression, while the on-screen graphic elements remain static except for the change in the bottom ticker text.
